title: Relativity
description: Take control over the flow of time.
body:
# ![Relativity](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/eth0net/relativity/1.19/assets/icons/fitted-anim.png)

Take control over the flow of time.

[![Made for Modfest: Singularity](https://blob.jortage.com/blobs/5/d4d/5d4d14d96db2e2024d87cf5606cb7ce6421633a002e328947f85d210ba250ecb9f86de8df210dd031be2d4eafb0980494e7a1e8e99590a550abaa42d82768b9f)](https://modfest.net/)

## Getting Started

- Craft the Staff of Relativity
- Use the staff to stop time
- Sneak and use the staff to start time

## Features

- Craftable Staff of Relativity
- Requires op on servers
- Op / cheat keybinds for finer control
